CVE-2020-6624.title: jhead through 3.04 has a heap-based buffer over-read in process_D ...
CVE-2020-6624.description: jhead through 3.04 has a heap-based buffer over-read in process_DQT in jpgqguess.c.

CVE-2020-6625.title: jhead through 3.04 has a heap-based buffer over-read in Get32s wh ...
CVE-2020-6625.description: jhead through 3.04 has a heap-based buffer over-read in Get32s when called from ProcessGpsInfo in gpsinfo.c.

CVE-2022-28550.title: Matthias-Wandel/jhead jhead 3.06 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow ...
CVE-2022-28550.description: Matthias-Wandel/jhead jhead 3.06 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via shellescape(), jhead.c, jhead. jhead copies strings to a stack buffer when it detects a &i or &o. However, jhead does not check the boundary of the stack buffer. As a result, there will be a stack buffer overflow problem when multiple `&i` or `&o` are given.

CVE-2024-2824.title: A vulnerability was found in Matthias-Wandel jhead 3.08 and class ...
CVE-2024-2824.description: A vulnerability was found in Matthias-Wandel jhead 3.08 and classified as critical. This issue affects the function PrintFormatNumber of the file exif.c. The manipulation leads to heap-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-257711.
